description_long: This is a vintage-style chest of drawers with a distressed white finish on the front, sides, and top, and a contrasting dark wood back panel. The chest features four spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate metal handles in a classic antique style. The surface shows signs of wear and aging, giving it a rustic, shabby-chic appearance. The top is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides are plain and slightly tapered, while the back is a solid, darker wood, likely for structural support. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood with metal hardware, and it would be at home in an urban setting such as a sidewalk, garage, or neighborhood curb.
description: A distressed white, vintage chest of drawers with four ornate-handled drawers and a dark wood back panel. The surface is worn, giving it a rustic, antique look.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with ornate metal handles and distressed white paint.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, slightly tapered white panel with visible wear.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, dark wood panel contrasting with the white-painted sides and top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a plain, worn white panel.
